root_text.sn19.4:1.1: “Idhāhaṁ, āvuso, gijjhakūṭā pabbatā orohanto addasaṁ nicchaviṁ purisaṁ vehāsaṁ gacchantaṁ.
root_text.sn19.4:1.2: Tamenaṁ gijjhāpi kākāpi kulalāpi anupatitvā anupatitvā vitacchenti virājenti.
root_text.sn19.4:1.4: eso, bhikkhave, satto imasmiṁyeva rājagahe orabbhiko ahosi …pe….

translation_text.sn19.4:1.1: “Just now, reverend, as I was descending from Vulture’s Peak Mountain I saw a flayed man flying through the air.
translation_text.sn19.4:1.2: Vultures, crows, and hawks kept chasing it, pecking and clawing
translation_text.sn19.4:1.4: “That being used to be a sheep butcher right here in Rājagaha. …”
